article_id: Article 1. The Federal Republic of Somalia
text_snippet: 1. Somalia is a federal, sovereign, and democratic republic founded on inclusive representation of the people and a multiparty system and social justice. 2. After Allah the Almighty, all power is vest

article_id: Article 10. Human Dignity

article_id: Article 100. Responsibilities and Powers of the Prime Minister

article_id: Article 101. Deputy Prime Minister
text_snippet: The Deputy Prime Minister acts for the Prime Minister when the Prime Minister is out of the country, and carries out other responsibilities as may be delegated by the Prime Minister.

article_id: Article 102. Functions of the Minister, Deputy-Minister and State Minister

article_id: Article 105. The Judicial Authority of the Federal Republic of Somalia
text_snippet: 1. Judicial authority is vested in the courts. 2. The judicial structure shall be regulated in a law enacted by the Federal Parliament.

text_snippet: The official language of the Federal Republic of Somalia is Somali (Maay and Maxaa-tiri), and Arabic is the second language.
